assets.detailsDescription: Complete information for the selected asset
assets.autoIdHint: ID will be auto-generated (e.g.: TRS001, TRC002, TRL003)
assets.allocationSpecificHint: Asset will be allocated to a specific investor
assets.duplicateTrailerId: This Trailer ID is already in use. Please use a different ID.
assets.validationError: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
assets.noAssetsRegistered: There are no assets registered in the system.
assets.exportDescription: Asset spreadsheet downloaded with all details.
assets.noFilterResults: No assets match the applied filters

maintenance.title: Maintenance Schedules
maintenance.subtitle: Manage trailer maintenance schedules
maintenance.formScheduleTypeDescription: Time-based: Maintenance every X days. KM-based: Maintenance every X kilometers
maintenance.formIntervalDaysDescription: How often should maintenance be performed (in days)
maintenance.formIntervalKmDescription: How often should maintenance be performed (in kilometers)

validation.intervalDaysMin: Interval must be at least 1 day
validation.intervalKmMin: Interval must be at least 1 km
validation.lastMaintenanceKmMin: Last maintenance KM must be 0 or greater

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences and settings
settings.systemIntegrationsDesc: Configure payment gateways and external services
settings.configurationNoteDesc: Integration settings are currently managed via environment variables in Replit Secrets. This UI will be fully functional in a future update for easier configuration management.
settings.billingConfigDescription: Configure the payment methods (PIX and bank transfer) that will appear on your customers' invoices.
settings.billingPixDescription: Receive payments via PIX key. Leave blank to disable.
settings.billingPixKeyPlaceholder: CPF, CNPJ, email, phone, or random key
settings.billingBankDescription: Bank transfer details (TED/DOC). Bank name and account are required.
settings.billingSaveSuccessDescription: New invoices will use these details.

gpsConfig.noDevicesHint: Click "New GPS Device" to add your first device
gpsConfig.dialogNewDescription: Register a new GPS tracking device
gpsConfig.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this GPS device?
gpsConfig.toastCreateDescription: GPS device has been successfully registered
gpsConfig.toastUpdateDescription: GPS device has been successfully updated
gpsConfig.toastDeleteDescription: GPS device has been successfully removed

inspections.title: Inspections & Checklists
inspections.subtitle: Manage trailer inspection checklists
inspections.dialogCreateDescription: Fill in the inspection details below
inspections.dialogDetailsDescription: Review and approve or reject this inspection

rentalClients.title: Rental Clients
rentalClients.subtitle: Manage transportation companies renting trailers
rentalClients.noClientsHint: Click "New Rental Client" to add your first client
rentalClients.dialogCreateDescription: Register a new transportation company as rental client
rentalClients.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this client? This action cannot be undone.
rentalClients.toastCreateDescription: Rental client has been successfully registered
rentalClients.toastUpdateDescription: Rental client has been successfully updated
rentalClients.toastDeleteDescription: Rental client has been successfully removed

rentalContracts.title: Rental Contracts
rentalContracts.subtitle: Manage trailer rental agreements with clients
rentalContracts.noContractsHint: Click "New Contract" to create your first contract
rentalContracts.dialogCreateDescription: Create a new trailer rental agreement
rentalContracts.confirmTerminate: Are you sure you want to terminate this contract? This will change its status to cancelled.
rentalContracts.toastCreateDescription: Rental contract has been successfully created
rentalContracts.toastUpdateDescription: Rental contract has been successfully updated
rentalContracts.toastCancelDescription: Rental contract has been successfully cancelled
rentalContracts.generateInvoiceConfirmDescription: This will create an invoice for contract {{contract}} ({{client}}) for the current month, using the monthly rate and payment due days configured on the contract.
rentalContracts.toastGenerateInvoiceDescription: The invoice has been created and is available on the Invoices page.
rentalContracts.toastGenerateInvoiceDuplicateTitle: Invoice already exists for this month
rentalContracts.toastGenerateInvoiceDuplicateDescription: This contract already has an invoice for the current month. Check the Invoices page.
rentalContracts.toastGenerateInvoiceErrorDescription: Could not generate the invoice right now. Please try again.
rentalContracts.toastGenerateInvoiceMissingRateDescripti: The contract has no monthly rate configured. Edit the contract before generating the invoice.

invoices.title: Invoices & Billing
invoices.subtitle: Manage rental invoices and track payments
invoices.noInvoices: No invoices found. Create your first invoice to get started.
invoices.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?
invoices.dialogCreateDescription: Generate a new invoice for a rental contract
invoices.formContractAutoFillHint: The fields below are filled in from the selected contract. You can edit them before saving.
invoices.paymentRejectedAmountDescription: The paid amount does not match the invoice amount. Confirm the mismatch or adjust the value.
invoices.paymentRejectedStatusDescription: This invoice cannot be marked as paid from its current status.
invoices.paymentAlreadyPaidDescription: This invoice has already been marked as paid.
invoices.paymentValidatedDescription: Payment was validated and the invoice is marked as paid.
invoices.paymentOverrideAppliedDescription: Invoice marked as paid despite an amount mismatch (recorded in audit log).
invoices.reissueConfirmDescription: Do you want to reissue invoice {{invoiceNumber}}? The status will be updated and a new due date will be calculated automatically based on the contract's payment terms.
invoices.toastReissueDescription: The invoice has been reissued with a new due date.
invoices.previewDescription: See how the invoice will look for the client, including header, line items and totals.
invoices.previewError: Could not load the preview for this invoice.
invoices.itemsManageDescription: Add a row per trailer or add-on (insurance, GPS, maintenance). When rows exist here, they replace the default single-row line on the PDF.
invoices.itemsEmpty: No line items yet — the invoice will use the default single-row line from the contract.
invoices.itemsToastAddDescription: The new row was added to this invoice.
invoices.itemsToastDeleteDescription: The row was removed from this invoice.
invoices.itemsToastValidationDescription: Please fill in description, rate and quantity before adding a row.
invoices.payDialogDescription: Choose a payment method. Billing details are configured by the company administrator.
invoices.payNoMethods: No payment methods configured for this tenant. Go to Settings to register PIX or bank details.
invoices.payStripeDescription: Pay with credit card via Stripe Checkout.

register.footer: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service

hero.title: Real asset investments with
hero.description: Institutional platform for investing in commercial trailers. Track your assets in real-time, receive monthly returns on schedule, and build wealth with complete transparency.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple and transparent process to start investing in real assets

features.title: Complete management platform
features.subtitle: Cutting-edge technology to maximize your investments

investment.title: Investment
investment.content: Investments starting from R$ 500 in trailer shares. Complete share management system with automatic allocation and ownership control.

gps.title: GPS Tracking
gps.content: 24/7 real-time monitoring of all trailers. Geolocation system with complete history and movement alerts.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.content: Advanced dashboard with performance metrics, ROI per trailer, comparison between asset types and profitability forecasts.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.content: Registered contracts, complete audit, LGPD compliance and automatic generation of financial reports and receipts.

payments.title: Payments
payments.content: Automatic monthly payment system of 2% per month. Processing on the 5th of each month with instant notifications.

pricing.title: Investment plans
pricing.subtitle: All plans with guaranteed profitability of 24% per year

cta.title: Start investing today
cta.subtitle: Join over 2,500 investors building wealth securely

footer.description: Institutional platform for real asset investment. Transparency, technology, and security for your wealth.

globalNetwork.title: Global
globalNetwork.description: Investors in over 30 countries trust Opus Capital to diversify wealth with real assets and consistent returns.

broker.title: Broker Dispatch
broker.subtitle: Manage freight broker dispatches and loads

emptyState.title: No dispatches yet

cookies.title: Cookies & Privacy
cookies.description: We use essential cookies to improve your experience and analyze platform usage. By continuing to browse, you agree to our privacy policy.
cookies.feature3: Your data is protected under LGPD and GDPR
